topStories.description: The Supreme Court will decide whether ballots mailed on time but arriving after Election Day can be counted, a practice used in 14 states.

dailyNews.title: Middle East conflict: Iran uses Spanish PM's ‘illegal and inhuman war' remark on missiles targeting Israel | Watch
dailyNews.description: In the conflict between the US, Israel and Iran, Spanish PM Pedro Sanchez's remarks have now garnered attention. The Iranian military used Sanchez's anti-war remarks and slapped them on missiles targeting Israel.

dailyNews.title: Quote of the Day by Adobe CEO Shantanu Narayen: ‘Big won’t beat small anymore, it will be…'
dailyNews.description: Today, we're diving into the wisdom of a leader who has shaped the digital world we live in. Shantanu Narayen, the CEO of Adobe, is known for his strategic vision and his commitment to creativity and innovation. His words often inspire us to think bigger and act bolder.

dailyNews.title: US-Iran conflict to ease after talks? Read Trump's statement on his decision about strikes against Tehran's energy sites
dailyNews.description: Trump paused military strikes after productive talks with Iran. Meanwhile, Adm. Brad Cooper urged Iranian civilians to stay indoors while the US and Israel target Iran's military infrastructure. The conflict, which began on Feb 28, has resulted in over 2,000 deaths and global market disruptions.

dailyNews.description: Sen. John Kennedy says he'd accept a deal to reopen the government without ICE funding, then pass ICE funding separately via reconciliation.

dailyNews.title: If Cuba falls, who steps in? Castro dynasty shadows island’s future
dailyNews.description: As President Donald Trump signals possible action, experts say Cuba has no clear successor while Raúl Castro, 94, remains a significant influence on the communist country.

dailyNews.title: Markets Rally as Trump’s Iran Deadline Is Deferred
dailyNews.description: Stock futures rose and oil prices fell after President Trump cited “very good and productive” talks with Iran over ending the war.

dailyNews.title: A Deadly Collision at LaGuardia Airport, and Trump Postpones Strait of Hormuz Deadline
dailyNews.description: Plus, chasing meteorites for money.

dailyNews.title: Suspect in Chicago Student’s Killing Was in U.S. Illegally, D.H.S. Says
dailyNews.description: Sheridan Gorman, 18, was killed last week near Loyola University Chicago. The Trump administration has sought to highlight crimes committed by undocumented people in its deportation campaign.

dailyNews.title: Christopher Columbus Statue Is Installed on White House Grounds
dailyNews.description: The statue of the explorer, a replica of one that protesters toppled in 2020, was placed outside the Eisenhower Executive Office Building.

dailyNews.title: When Voters Worry About ‘Affordability,’ Many Point to Health Care
dailyNews.description: Democrats have had limited political success running on the Affordable Care Act, even with its relative popularity. Now President Trump’s health care cuts may have given the issue new resonance.

dailyNews.title: How Obama’s Strategist Discouraged Biden From Running in 2016
dailyNews.description: In a new set of oral histories, David Plouffe, President Barack Obama’s political adviser, described how he urged Vice President Joseph R. Biden Jr. not to challenge Hillary Clinton for the nomination.

dailyNews.title: ICE agents deployed to some U.S. airports as TSA lines stretch for hours
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration began deploying U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement agents to some of the busiest airports in the country Monday morning.

dailyNews.title: Trump says Strait of Hormuz deadline delayed amid talks with Iran
dailyNews.description: As Iran threatens to mine the entire Persian Gulf, Trump says his deadline for the Strait of Hormuz to reopen is postponed amid negotiations with Tehran.

dailyNews.title: Trump orders ICE agents to help TSA at U.S. airports as government shutdown chaos continues
dailyNews.description: President Trump ordered ICE agents to help TSA officers at airports across the U.S. burdened by the lapse in funding due to a partial government shutdown. CBS News' Camilo Montoya-Galvez reports.

dailyNews.title: Trump says strikes on Iran power plants postponed due to "GOOD AND PRODUCTIVE" talks with Tehran
dailyNews.description: President Trump posted on social media that due to "GOOD AND PRODUCTIVE" talks with Iran, he has instructed the Pentagon to halt strikes against power plants and energy infrastructure. CBS News contributor Robert Berger has more.

dailyNews.title: Trump postpones threat to attack Iran power plants as Israel launches new strikes
dailyNews.description: In the Iran war, President Trump postponed his threat to strike Iran's civilian power plants if the Strait of Hormuz isn't reopened. Charlie D'Agata has the latest on the war, including new attacks from Israel and Iran continuing to strike back.
